label: Ledgerhouse Stores
description: Ledgerhouse Stores forms the sealed provisioning chamber of the Meridian Ledgerhouse, built as a narrow plasteel-lined room set behind tamper-latched bulkhead panels. Ration crates and canister racks stand in fixed, deck-bolted frames, each bay marked by stenciled service numerals that mirror the suite’s conduit indexing. A humidity-controlled cabinet and a lockable chem-safe recess occupy the inner wall, their gaskets and drip pans designed for prolonged isolation. Illumination remains a low, steady lumen strip-glow, and the air retains the dry sterility of filtered circulation carried through armored junction boxes.
